title: Lumina Fables
description: A modernized vanilla+ Minecraft ! Optimized and available in 1.21.7 !
body:
![Band](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5f0daef5b83e2189224dd05e96a1fa64f54097fd_0.webp)
**Message from August 31 2025** : Lumina Fables will be discontinued when version 2.1.0 is released

**Message from July 5 2025** : Radium has become Lumina Fables to refresh the image of this modpack

**Message from June 7 2025** : The direction of this modpack has changed, I no longer want the most optimized modpack (but I still want it to be optimized for those who have bad PCs), the slogan, the logo and I allow myself to add more mods like Hold My Items !
# ⭐ Lumina Fables
A modernized vanilla+ Minecraft !

✔️ Modern Look

✔️ QoL Features

✔️ Shaders and Resources Packs Support

✔️ Multiplayer Support
## 🖥️ Hardware
### Minimum :
- CPU : Dual-core 2.3+ GHz
- GPU : Integrated graphics with 1GB VRAM
- Dedicated RAM : 1.5GB
- Free Storage : 2GB
- Java : Java 21
### Recommended :
- CPU : Quad-core 2.8+ GHz
- GPU : Graphics card with 2GB VRAM
- Dedicated RAM : 2GB
- Free Storage : 4GB 
- Java : Java 21
## 📈 Performance
- **FPS** : Min : ~270 FPS | **AVG : ~440-460 FPS** | Max : ~520-570 FPS

- 12 Render Distence, Graphics Fancy, 2Gb Dedicated RAM

- Tested with : Ryzen 5 7535HS, RTX 4060 Laptop, 16Gb RAM (Tested in Release 1.2.17 1.21.5)
## 📫FAQ
- I found a bug, how to report it ? : Join my [discord](https://discord.gg/pcGmgzm4TZ)

- Can y use Lumina Fables as a base in my modpack ? : No, maybe if you ask me on discord

- Why "Modernized" ? : Because Lumina Fables offers a unique experience with a unique vibe ♥️

- Why "Vanilla+" ? : Because Lumina Fables changes certain mechanics
## ❓ Others
- Based on Minecraft 1.21.7 and [Fabric](https://fabricmc.net/) 0.17.2
- The CPU and GPU requirements in this description were generated using AI (which may not be accurate)
- When a new Minecraft version is released, Lumina Fables updates ~1 month later
- Lumina Fables is not made to be played with shaders (apart from light shaders)
- Lumina Fables reserves the right to modify the fabric.json file and redistribute it (without permissions)

<details>
<summary>🧪 Versionning</summary>

## 🔍 Versioning Breakdown
- X : Major version (Breaking changes or major change of direction)
- Y : Medium version (Minecraft updates or thematic update)
- Z : Minor version (Mod/Config updates or others things)

## 📌 Version Format
- Stable : X.Y.Z (Release, tested and stable)
- Pre-release : X.Y.Z Pre-X (Test version, may contain bugs)
## ⚠️ Pre-Release
- Pre Release = Test version, potentially with bugs and not polite

**⚠️ Note:** Pre-release versions will be marked as Alpha (untested) or Beta (partially tested).
</details>
